🐢 Wildlife Guaranteed
Our Promise
NO TURTLE?
WE GO AGAIN.
FREE.

Every operator in Marsa Alam promises an "unforgettable experience." We promise something specific: if wildlife doesn't show up on your tour, your next trip is on us. No store credit. No "subject to conditions." Free.

The Wildlife Guarantee

Sea turtles · Dugongs · Nurse sharks · Eagle rays · Octopus. If you don't spot wildlife on your trip — you come back with us, free of charge. Zero small print.

Ask About This

🐢 Meko · Founder & Guide

You're not booking a company.

YOU'RE BOOKING MEKO.

I've spent 20 years on these reefs. I know where the turtles sleep, when the dugongs feed, and why the big tour boats always leave disappointed guests behind.

I started MantaAlam because I was tired of watching tourists pay for "Red Sea adventures" and come back with nothing but a sunburn. Every guest matters. That's why we cap every boat at 8 — never more.

Honest Pricing
WHAT WE NEVER CHARGE FOR.

Big tour boats hide fees. Park entry. "Equipment rental." "Captain tip." Then they pile 40 people onto one boat. Here's exactly what you get with us — and what we don't charge for.

Snorkeling EquipmentMask, fins, life jacket — full size range
✓ Included
Hotel Pickup & ReturnDirect transfer — no other guests collected
✓ Included
Multilingual GuideEN · DE · IT · PL · CZ
✓ Included
Traditional Egyptian LunchOn the boat or at a Bedouin restaurant
✓ Included
Wildlife GuaranteeNo sighting? Free return trip
✓ Included
Park Fees & PermitsWadi El Gemal, Marine Park entry
✓ Included
Underwater PhotosSent to your WhatsApp the next day
✓ Included
💬

Why no public price? Every group is different. Couples, families, solo travelers — pricing changes with group size, dates, and which tour you choose. Send Meko a WhatsApp message — you'll get a clear, all-inclusive quote within 2 hours. No phone calls. No spam. No hidden fees.
